ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "unit" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter the specification belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Acceptable range of deviation from the typical value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specification was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the specification's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter the condition applies to */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for testing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test condition was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the test condition's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the unit's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the version applies to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component specification */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the report is for */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("conducted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter the annotation applies to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation has been addressed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)
